# Interface: MatchableRequest

Defined in: [core/contracts/types.ts:6](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/contracts/types.ts#L6)

The observed outgoing request, reduced to what trigger matchers inspect.
Built once per request by the MSW integration and handed to
[InterceptTrigger.match](InterceptTrigger.md#match).

Defined in: [core/contracts/types.ts:8](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/contracts/types.ts#L8)
